Footer.tagline: Ghar Ka Kaam, FixMate Ke Naam

Home.launchEyebrow: Islamabad aur Rawalpindi ke active areas mein service
Home.title: Ghar ki repair, sahi tareeqay se.
Home.lead: Plumbing, electrical, AC, appliances, carpentry aur aam repairs ke liye verified professionals dhoondhein—wazeh approval aur har qadam par support ke saath.
Home.joinProfessional: Professional ke taur par join karein
Home.proofBeforeWork: Paid kaam shuru honay se pehle
Home.promise: Verified professional, wazeh price, recorded job aur masla honay par support.
Home.servicesTitle: Rozmarra repairs ke liye aik bharosemand jagah
Home.servicesLead: Masla asaan alfaaz, photo ya voice note mein batayein. FixMate aap ki request sahi professional tak pohanchane mein madad karta hai.

plumbing.title: Plumbing
plumbing.description: Leakage, taps, drains, toilet, pipes, water connections aur pump ke masail.

electrical.title: Electrical
electrical.description: Fault finding, switches, sockets, lights, fans, breakers aur wiring.

ac.title: AC aur refrigeration
ac.description: Inspection, service, installation, cooling faults aur fridge repair.

appliances.title: Appliance repair
appliances.description: Washing machine, microwave, dispenser, geyser aur ghar ke appliances.

carpentry.title: Carpentry aur furniture
carpentry.description: Doors, cabinets, locks, shelves, assembly aur choti restoration.

handyman.title: Handyman
handyman.description: Mounting, drilling, hanging, sealant, assembly aur aam ghar ki repairs.

Home.howTitle: Maslay se professional tak teen wazeh qadam
Home.howLead: Web platform ko is tarah banaya ja raha hai ke poora service process asaan, traceable aur protected ho.

request.title: Batayein kya theek karwana hai
request.description: Service select karein aur masla apne alfaaz mein batayein. Zaroorat par photo ya voice note lagayein.

compare.title: Munasib professionals compare karein
compare.description: Qualified options, expected arrival aur transparent estimates ko asani se compare karein.

complete.title: Approve karein aur record rakhein
complete.description: Kaam se pehle final scope approve karein aur service, payment aur warranty record sambhal kar rakhein.

Home.safetyTitle: Bharosa process ka hissa hai—baad mein add nahi hota.
Home.safetyLead: FixMate aik managed service marketplace hai. Identity, access, approvals aur aham status changes har layer par protected hain.

safety.identity: Professional verification customer rating se alag rakhi jati hai.
safety.price: Chargeable kaam final scope ki customer approval ke baad shuru hota hai.
safety.record: Aham actions authorized, timestamped aur recorded hotay hain.
safety.support: Zaroorat par job evidence aur support history available rehti hai.

Home.learnSafety: Safety aur bharose ke baare mein janein
Home.professionalTitle: Behtareen kaam karein. Bharosemand digital reputation banayein.
Home.professionalLead: Professional profile banayein, services aur areas select karein, verification documents submit karein aur mobile-friendly dashboard se availability manage karein.
